title: pilosella onegensis subsp. glaucochroa
intro: Pilosella onegensis subsp. glaucochroa, also known as the Kola mountain dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to certain regions of the world. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella onegensis subsp. glaucochroa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and infusing its leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
